steps.title: Spot the goal-to-action relationship
steps.content: The first sentence states Amber's goal: avoiding harsh synthetic dyes. The second sentence describes an action: experimenting with natural dyes. The transition must bridge the motivation to the resulting action.

steps.title: Match the transition to the relationship
steps.content: ”With this in mind,” shows the artist's action (experimenting with natural dyes) flows directly from her goal (avoiding harsh synthetic dyes). The other three either summarize what's not a summary (B), mark a contradiction where none exists (C), or signal an unexpected fact that isn't (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
